data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the walk-up QR booking functionality, but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for walk-up QR booking, but there are no concrete details or evidence to support that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of walk-up QR booking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the walk-up QR booking requirement.
